hero.headline: The system isn't broken. It's working exactly as designed. Just not for you.
hero.subheadline: Money should move free and instant. Savings should grow. Your money should work while you sleep.

paragraphs.p1: My grandmother never had access to good financial opportunities.
paragraphs.p2: The system was never built for people like her. Like me. Like you.
paragraphs.p3: Access was locked behind high minimums, complicated words, and big financial institutions.
paragraphs.p4: I'm building this for her and for everyone she represents who deserves better and never got it.

step1.title: Deposit Send Pay
step1.description: Create your account and deposit with ACH or debit/credit card. Your money is converted into stable cryptocurrencies (stablecoins) worth 1:1 with the dollar.
step1.quote: I send money anywhere. Arrives instantly. Fast, secure, and simple.

step2.title: Invest Buy Sell
step2.description: Your access to global opportunities in Stocks, ETFs, Crypto, and Gold.
step2.quote: I had $200 sitting in my account doing nothing. Now it's growing.

step3.title: Strategies Alerts Cash Out
step3.description: Your money grows. We keep you informed. When you want to withdraw, you withdraw. Instantly, no penalties or tricks.
step3.quote: My money earns while I sleep. Adelaide tells me how it's going.

card1.title: Splitting dinner in San Francisco
card1.description: Four friends. One tap. Done before the waiter brings the check.

card2.title: Paying a designer in Dubai
card2.description: They're in the Middle East. You're in America. The money arrives before the meeting ends.

card3.title: Emergency money to Mom
card3.description: 3 AM. She needs it now. Not during "business hours."

slide1.title: Send & Receive
slide1.description: Send money to anyone, anywhere. Request payments. Split expenses. Any amount, real-time and worldwide.

slide2.title: Goal-Based Strategies
slide2.description: Pick a goal. Pick a risk level. Each strategy stress-tested with thousands of simulations. You choose the direction. We handle the complexity.

slide3.tagline: Your money works while you sleep
slide3.title: No Surprises
slide3.description: 24/7. No weekends. No holidays. No business hours. Your money, always available, whenever you need it, for whatever you need.

fees.title: Your money. Your rules. No surprises.
fees.subtitle: See exactly what you pay. Here's everything. No fine print.
fees.disclaimer: No monthly fees. No minimum balance. No hidden spreads. No surprises.
fees.example: Example: A $100 investment costs you $0.39 with diBoaS. The same purchase costs $1.50–$2.50 elsewhere.

strategies.diboas: Free to start, 0.39% when you stop

paragraphs.p1: Fair question. Here's the honest answer:
paragraphs.p2: The best financial opportunities were locked behind big banks and hedge funds. You needed money to make money.
paragraphs.p3: New technology (Blockchain) changed that. It made it possible to access the same opportunities without the middlemen.
paragraphs.p4: We didn't invent this. We just made it simple enough that anyone can use it.
paragraphs.p5: We win when you win. When you grow, we grow. Our interests are aligned.

demo.subtext: See exactly how diBoaS works. No signup, no real money. You can simulate deposits, transfers, investments, and withdrawals.

waitlist.description: We're opening diBoaS to a small group first. If you like what you see, sign up.
waitlist.privacyNote: We'll never spam you. Just updates on when you can get started.

isBank.question: Is diBoaS a bank?
isBank.answer: No. diBoaS is a platform that helps you connect with financial opportunities. We don't touch, hold, access, or manage your money. You control your own funds directly through your personal wallet. We provide the tools, you make the decisions.

howPossible.question: How is this possible without high fees?
howPossible.answer: First, by the will to create something new, for people who never had a fair chance. Second, by removing the middlemen, the branches, the executives, the legacy systems. We use modern technology (Blockchain) that costs a fraction of what traditional finance charges.

safety.question: Is my money safe?
safety.answer: Your money is secured by you. We use security technology, with industry-leading partners, but ultimately you're in control. That's the point — no one else can access your funds without your permission.

understanding.question: What if I don't understand investing?
understanding.answer: That's exactly who we built this for. Our goal is to make it so simple that anyone can do it. No jargon. No complicated decisions. Just clear options and transparent information.

minimum.question: What's the minimum amount to start?
minimum.answer: Start with as little as $5. No minimum balance requirements.

footer.tagline: Open access and fair opportunities for everyone!

disclosures.general: This content is for educational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, financial advice, or any other type of advice. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Any historical data or simulations are hypothetical and not guarantees.
disclosures.crypto: The value of crypto-assets may fluctuate. You may lose some or all of your money. Crypto-assets are not covered by deposit guarantee schemes.
disclosures.stories: User stories are illustrative examples and do not represent specific individuals.
disclosures.ai: This content was created with the assistance of artificial intelligence and reviewed for accuracy. AI-generated content has inherent limitations. Verify important information independently before making decisions.
disclosures.mica: This crypto-asset marketing communication has not been reviewed or approved by any competent authority in any Member State of the European Union. The offeror of the crypto-asset is solely responsible for the content of this marketing communication.
disclosures.cvm: Past returns are not a guarantee of future returns. Investments involve risks and may result in losses, including the total loss of the capital invested. Prospective percentages reflect only the author's opinion, based on information available at the time and considered reliable.
disclosures.bcb: diBoaS is not a financial institution authorized by the Central Bank of Brazil.
disclosures.us: diBoaS is a non-custodial interface providing access to decentralized finance protocols. diBoaS is not registered with the SEC, CFTC, FinCEN, or any state regulatory agency. US regulatory treatment of DeFi is evolving. You are responsible for determining whether your use of this interface complies with applicable laws.
disclosures.closing: You decide what's best for your situation.

seo.title: diBoaS | The System Wasn't Built for You. We're Changing That.
seo.description: Money should move free and instant. Savings should grow. Your money should work while you sleep. Meet diBoaS.
seo.ogTitle: The system isn't broken. It's working exactly as designed. Just not for you.
seo.ogDescription: It started with my grandmother. I learned what banks don't tell us. That's why I'm building diBoaS.
